description.value:
Prerequisite: Sneak attack +2d6.

Benefit: When applied to a Chakra Control or Ninjutsu technique that either has a single target or is shaped to target a number of creatures up to your Intelligence modifier (maximum 3), you may apply your sneak attack damage dice to the total damage dealt if you qualify for sneak attack damage. In addition, you gain a +4 bonus to checks to conceal the technique's Chakra Cost. The technique's Perform Requirements increase by 6, and the Chakra Cost increases by 3, plus 1 for every 2 Ranks of the technique (rounded up).

Special: A technique enhanced by this feat cannot be enhanced by other meta-Chakra feats.
